event_world_42_20260423_180219_0000.name: City Half Marathon
event_world_42_20260423_180219_0000.description: 21 km through the city's most iconic neighbourhoods, with live bands at every kilometre marker and a rooftop finish-line party for all finishers.

reviews.text: Performers were 90 minutes late and the cancellation announcement came via a single tweet.
The concept was interesting but execution felt rushed and under-rehearsed.
Long waits at every food and drink stall; the cashless payment system crashed repeatedly.
Confusing layout and poor signage made it hard to navigate between stages.
The opening ceremony alone was worth the ticket price — truly spectacular pyrotechnics.

Accessible entrances were well signed and staff were genuinely helpful to our group member using a wheelchair.

event_world_42_20260423_180219_0001.name: Artisan Crafts & Vintage Fair
event_world_42_20260423_180219_0001.description: Over 200 stalls of handmade jewellery, vintage clothing, rare books, and bespoke homeware from independent makers across the region.

reviews.text: Accessible entrances were well signed and staff were genuinely helpful to our group member using a wheelchair.
Perfectly sized event — big enough to have scale but small enough to feel personal and accessible.
Too many commercial sponsors with their logos dominating every surface — completely killed the atmosphere.

event_world_42_20260423_180219_0002.name: Immersive Van Gogh
event_world_42_20260423_180219_0002.description: Walk inside the brushstrokes of van Gogh's masterworks as floor-to-ceiling 3D projections transform the gallery into Starry Night and Sunflowers.

reviews.text: Beautifully curated programme with a strong balance of emerging and established artists.
The app kept showing wrong tent locations and staff gave contradictory directions.
The interactive exhibition was unlike anything I had seen — genuinely moving and intellectually engaging.
Average experience — neither the worst nor the best event I have attended this year.

event_world_42_20260423_180219_0003.name: Folk & Roots Gathering
event_world_42_20260423_180219_0003.description: Celebrate the roots of acoustic music with storytelling songwriters from across the globe, sharing ballads, blues, and bluegrass on an intimate outdoor stage.

reviews.text: Accessible entrances were well signed and staff were genuinely helpful to our group member using a wheelchair.
Overcrowded beyond safe limits; I had to leave early as the crowd pressure near the stage felt dangerous.
The concept was interesting but execution felt rushed and under-rehearsed.

reviews.text: Great variety of acts and the venue layout meant you were never far from a stage.
